name: job-agent
description: Autonomous LinkedIn job application agent powered by AI and MCP

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/cv-parser && npm run build -w packages/linkedin-mcp && npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/reporter && npm run build -w apps/cli
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/core" "npm run dev -w packages/cv-parser" "npm run dev -w packages/linkedin-mcp" "npm run dev -w packages/api"
